faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our luxury valet parking and logistics services.

items.question: What level of insurance coverage do you carry?
items.answer: We carry an industry-leading $4,000,000 commercial umbrella liability policy, along with comprehensive general liability and Garagekeepers legal liability insurance, providing absolute peace of mind.

items.question: What regions do you service?
items.answer: We provide premier valet parking and traffic management services across South Florida (including Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties) and the Atlanta metropolitan area in Georgia.

items.question: How far in advance should we book for private events?
items.answer: To ensure optimal staffing, site planning, and scheduling, we recommend booking at least 2 weeks in advance. However, we do accommodate last-minute events based on availability.

items.question: How do you handle vehicle keys and security?
items.answer: Keys are kept in secure, locked valet key podiums under strict key control protocols. Our attendants perform vehicle condition checks upon arrival, and keys are never left unattended.
